title: Klarna partners with Aritzia to bring flexible payment options to clients across Canada and the United States
full_text:
Toronto, April 8, 2025 – Klarna, the AI-powered payments and commerce network, is thrilled to announce its partnership with Aritzia to bring Klarna’s flexible and interest-free payment options to clients online and in select boutiques across US and Canada. 

Klarna's merchant network continues to expand rapidly— and this partnership furthers the list of top 100 US retailers that choose Klarna. In 2024, 110,000 new merchants joined Klarna, reinforcing its position as the go-to payment partner for businesses worldwide.

David Sykes, Chief Commercial Officer at Klarna, commented, "We are proud to partner with Aritzia, a brand that embodies beautiful design, high-quality materials and timeless style. This collaboration empowers clients with flexible, frictionless payment options as they build out their wardrobes.”

Klarna continues to attract leading brands, with a growing network of 720,000 merchants, and globally, 99,000 new users per day try Klarna. As more consumers seek out alternative payment options, Klarna’s flexible and customer-centric payment offerings have become increasingly alluring. This high consumer engagement in turn fuels merchant interest in Klarna’s growing commerce network.

Operating in over 26 countries across a number of verticals, Klarna is the everyday spending partner, everywhere for everything.

For more information, visit Klarna.com.
